# Agent Configuration Templates

This directory contains **template files** that demonstrate how to configure personal AI agent behavior in an one-context workspace.

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `SOUL.md` | Agent identity and personality definition |
| `USER.md` | User context and preferences |
| `IDENTITY.md` | Agent self-description |
| `HEARTBEAT.md` | Periodic check-in task list |
| `TOOLS.md` | Local tool configuration notes |

These are **examples** for reference. In practice, users would place their own versions in their workspace root directory to customize AI agent behavior.
